item.title: Version 1.6.0+1
item.description:
Version 1.6.0
- Settings reorganized into Preferences, Client tokens, and Updates / About; local backup and restore of app data with safer SQLite handling and optional ZIP encoding in a worker isolate. - Hub duplicate-agent guard: timeout and parsing for the connected-agents list before destructive restore operations. - Granular global client token permissions (DDL and resource-level rules) with SQL authorization updates and contract/schema alignment. - Playground query validation rejects common DDL-style statement prefixes; installer and app version 1.6.0+1.
Release includes the Windows installer asset PlugAgente-Setup-1.6.0.exe.

item.title: Version 1.5.3+1
item.description:
Version 1.5.3
- Harden the Windows auto-update flow by keeping the updater feed fixed per session and adding explicit trigger/completion timeout handling. - Persist manual update diagnostics, add dedicated auto-update metrics, and improve the Settings UI technical details for support scenarios. - Add DSA-signing support to the installer/release pipeline and embed the WinSparkle public key resource for future signed appcast publishing. - Release includes the Windows installer asset PlugAgente-Setup-1.5.3.exe.

item.title: Version 1.5.2+1
item.description:
Version 1.5.2
- ODBC reliability improvements for timeout, cancelation, pooling, and invalid-connection recovery. - Added regression coverage for provider recovery behavior and live bulk DML execution. - Release includes Windows installer asset PlugAgente-Setup-1.5.2.exe.

item.title: Version 1.5.1+1
item.description:
## Plug Agente 1.5.1
- Application version **1.5.1+1** (`pubspec.yaml`, Windows build, installer). - Fixes the auto-update flow by falling back to the official appcast feed when `AUTO_UPDATE_FEED_URL` is not explicitly configured. - Updates GitHub artifact actions to Node 24-compatible versions to remove Node 20 deprecation warnings from CI and release automation.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cesar-carlos/plug_agente/compare/v1.5.0...v1.5.1

item.title: Version 1.5.0+1
item.description:
## Plug Agente 1.5.0
- Application version **1.5.0+1** (`pubspec.yaml`, Windows build, installer). - Includes hardened hub reconnect and session recovery, SQL investigation feed and ODBC batch context improvements, and client token flow updates already merged to `main`. - Ships the Windows installer with the official auto-update feed embedded.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cesar-carlos/plug_agente/compare/v1.4.0...v1.5.0

item.title: Version 1.4.0+1
item.description:
## Plug Agente 1.4.0
- Application version **1.4.0+1** (\pubspec.yaml\, Windows build, installer). - Includes **JSON-RPC profile 2.9** with \^Ggent.getHealth\, SQL queue metrics, and related contract updates from prior commits on \main\.
Build the Windows installer after \lutter build windows --release\ using Inno Setup with \installer/setup.iss\ (output: \installer/dist/PlugAgente-Setup-1.4.0.exe\).

item.title: Version 1.2.0+19
item.description: Nova Versão 1.2.0+19 - Atualização automática via GitHub Release.
